name: native-motion
description: Self-contained native motion skills for Expo and React Native with bundled Reanimated, Expo, NativeWind, Lottie, Skia, Rive, R3F, and validation references.

interface.shortDescription: Build high-quality motion for Expo and React Native apps.
interface.longDescription: Self-contained native motion plugin for Expo and React Native apps: Reanimated/worklets, NativeWind boundaries, Expo UI controls and transitions, accessibility/performance, validation, and exact-trigger asset lanes for Lottie, Skia, Rive, and native R3F. Includes bundled Expo, Software Mansion, React Native, and vendor docs plus atomic-reference validation scripts.
defaultPrompt: Add a Reanimated transition to this Expo screen.
Plan a Rive or Lottie asset integration for React Native.
